title: Le voulé : le BBQ mahorais qui sent l’océan 🌊🔥
hook: Et si le meilleur repas de la semaine se mangeait pieds nus dans le sable ?

scenes.narration: Imaginez le crépitement des braises, l’odeur du poisson grillé et les rires des Mahorais qui transforment la plage en une immense table à ciel ouvert.
visuals: family setting up grill on sandy beach at sunset
smoke rising from charcoal grill on tropical shore
group of friends laughing around beach fire
scenes.image_prompt: photorealistic vertical 9:16 shot of a lively beach barbecue at golden hour in Mayotte, Indian Ocean island. A large family gathers around a charcoal grill on the sand, grilling fish and meat skewers. Palm trees sway in the background, turquoise waves gently lap the shore, and children play near the water. Warm sunset lighting, lush green vegetation, and smoke rising from the grill create a cozy, tropical atmosphere.
scenes.fact_used: Le voulé est un barbecue traditionnel mahorais sur la plage

scenes.narration: Ce sable chaud sous les pieds, c’est ça le voulé : un repas où la plage devient salon, et les Mahorais une grande famille les pieds dans l’eau.
visuals: bare feet walking on warm tropical beach sand
hands passing plate of food on sandy shore
children playing in sand near beach grill
scenes.image_prompt: close-up vertical 9:16 shot of bare feet sinking into warm, golden sand on a Mayotte beach. In the background, a group of people sit on colorful mats, sharing food around a grill. The turquoise ocean glistens under the setting sun, and palm fronds rustle in the breeze. Photorealistic, vibrant colors, and a sense of warmth and togetherness.
scenes.fact_used: Le repas se fait pieds dans le sable, en famille ou entre amis

scenes.narration: Entre rires et vagues, une odeur envoûte : celle des poissons grillés sur les braises, parfum d’océan qui rassemble les Mahorais.
visuals: whole fish grilling on charcoal over beach fire
skewers of meat sizzling on open flame
hands flipping grilled bananas on grill
scenes.image_prompt: detailed vertical 9:16 shot of fresh fish grilling on a charcoal fire on a Mayotte beach. The fish is seasoned and sizzling, with grill marks visible. In the foreground, skewers of meat and bananas plantains cook alongside. Smoke rises gently, and the ocean waves crash softly in the background. Warm, golden lighting, photorealistic textures, and a tropical island vibe.
scenes.fact_used: On y grille poissons, brochettes de viande et bananes plantains

scenes.narration: Juste à côté, les brochettes de viande dorent à point sur les braises, croustillantes et juteuses, tandis que les Mahorais partagent ce festin les pieds dans le sable.
visuals: close-up meat skewers turning golden on grill
hands brushing sauce on grilled meat
charcoal embers glowing under grill
scenes.image_prompt: extreme close-up vertical 9:16 shot of meat skewers grilling over charcoal on a Mayotte beach. The meat is juicy and caramelizing, with grill marks forming. A hand brushes sauce onto the skewers, and the glow of the embers lights up the scene. The background is blurred but shows the ocean and palm trees. Hyper-detailed, photorealistic, and vibrant.
scenes.fact_used: On y grille poissons, brochettes de viande et bananes plantains

scenes.narration: Et là, miracle des braises, les bananes plantains s’enrobent d’un caramel doré qui embaume l’air, tandis que les Mahorais les retournent avec gourmandise sous les étoiles.
visuals: grilled bananas plantains with caramelized edges
hands removing bananas from grill with tongs
close-up banana skin charring on flame
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 shot of bananas plantains grilling on a beach fire in Mayotte. The bananas are caramelizing, with charred edges and a glossy sheen. A pair of tongs lifts one from the grill, and the background shows a tropical beach with palm trees and the ocean. Warm, golden lighting, photorealistic textures, and a mouthwatering vibe.
scenes.fact_used: On y grille poissons, brochettes de viande et bananes plantains

scenes.narration: Sous les marmites qui crépitent, les Mahorais préparent le mataba, un délice de manioc et coco qui fond en bouche comme un nuage.
visuals: hands pounding cassava leaves in wooden mortar
steaming bowl of mataba with coconut milk
plate of mataba served with grilled fish
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 shot of a woman preparing mataba on a Mayotte beach. She pounds cassava leaves in a large wooden mortar, while a steaming bowl of mataba sits nearby, topped with coconut milk. In the background, grilled fish and bananas are visible on a plate. The scene is warm, tropical, and filled with rich textures and colors.
scenes.fact_used: Le mataba (feuilles de manioc pilé au coco) est souvent servi

scenes.narration: Et quand les feuilles de manioc rencontrent le lait de coco, c’est toute l’âme de Mayotte qui explose dans l’assiette des Mahorais.
visuals: close-up spoonful of mataba with coconut sauce
hands mixing cassava leaves and coconut milk
family passing bowl of mataba at beach meal
scenes.image_prompt: close-up vertical 9:16 shot of a spoonful of mataba, Mayotte’s traditional dish of pounded cassava leaves in coconut milk. The dish is rich and green, with a creamy texture. In the background, a family shares the meal on the beach, with grilled fish and bananas on the table. Photorealistic, vibrant, and inviting.
scenes.fact_used: Le mataba (feuilles de manioc pilé au coco) est souvent servi

scenes.narration: À Mayotte, le voulé unit les Mahorais pieds nus sur le sable, entre rires et vagues, pour partager un art de vivre sous les étoiles.
visuals: group of people laughing while sharing food on beach
elderly man passing plate to child on sandy shore
hands clinking glasses of coconut water
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 shot of a joyful family gathering on a Mayotte beach during a voulé. People of all ages sit on mats in the sand, laughing and sharing food. An elderly man passes a plate to a child, and glasses of coconut water are raised in a toast. The ocean glistens in the background, and palm trees sway gently. Warm, golden lighting, photorealistic, and full of life.
scenes.fact_used: Le repas se fait pieds dans le sable, en famille ou entre amis

scenes.narration: Pendant que les vagues chuchotent sur le sable, les enfants courent en riant et les Mahorais font griller poissons et bananes plantains sous le ciel étoilé.
visuals: children playing in shallow waves near beach grill
parents grilling while watching kids play in sand
young girl building sandcastle near family meal
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 shot of children playing in the shallow waves of a Mayotte beach while their parents prepare a voulé. The kids laugh and splash in the turquoise water, while the adults grill fish and meat nearby. A young girl builds a sandcastle in the foreground. The scene is lively, warm, and full of joy, with photorealistic details and vibrant colors.
scenes.fact_used: Le repas se fait pieds dans le sable, en famille ou entre amis

scenes.narration: Et là, entre les reflets roses du lagon et les braises qui crépitent, les Mahorais partagent bien plus qu’un repas : une histoire qui sent le sel et la joie.
visuals: sunset over turquoise lagoon with palm trees
silhouette of people grilling on beach at dusk
golden light reflecting on ocean waves
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 shot of a breathtaking sunset over the turquoise lagoon of Mayotte. The sky is painted in shades of pink, orange, and gold, reflecting on the calm ocean. In the foreground, a family grills fish and meat on the beach, their silhouettes framed by palm trees. The scene is serene, warm, and cinematic, with photorealistic details.
scenes.fact_used: Le voulé est un barbecue traditionnel mahorais sur la plage

scenes.narration: Chaque dimanche, les Mahorais se retrouvent sur le sable pour le voulé, ce moment sacré où le barbecue devient une fête entre ciel et mer.
visuals: large family gathering on beach for Sunday meal
hands passing food around beach table
group of friends sitting on mats in sand
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 shot of a large family gathering on a Mayotte beach for a Sunday voulé. People of all ages sit on colorful mats in the sand, sharing food and stories. The ocean waves crash softly in the background, and the golden sunset light bathes the scene. Photorealistic, warm, and full of life, capturing the essence of togetherness.
scenes.fact_used: C'est le rituel dominical par excellence pour beaucoup de Mahorais

scenes.narration: Et là, entre les rires et les braises qui crépitent, c’est tout Mayotte qui se retrouve autour d’un repas qui sent bon le lagon et la fraternité.
visuals: weekly beach gathering with same group of friends
family arriving at beach with baskets of food
hands setting up grill on same spot every Sunday
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 shot of a group of friends and family arriving at their usual spot on a Mayotte beach for their weekly voulé. They carry baskets of food and set up a grill in the sand, just like every Sunday. The ocean is calm, and the golden light of late afternoon creates a warm, inviting atmosphere. Photorealistic, nostalgic, and full of tradition.
scenes.fact_used: C'est le rituel dominical par excellence pour beaucoup de Mahorais

scenes.narration: Pieds nus dans le sable chaud, les Mahorais partagent brochettes et histoires sous les étoiles, jusqu’à ce que la mer murmure la fin de la fête.
visuals: group laughing under string lights on beach at night
people telling stories around beach fire
hands clapping to traditional music on shore
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 shot of a lively beach gathering in Mayotte at night. A group of friends and family sit around a fire on the sand, laughing and telling stories. String lights hang between palm trees, casting a warm glow over the scene. The ocean waves are visible in the background, and the atmosphere is magical, warm, and full of joy. Photorealistic and cinematic.
scenes.fact_used: Le repas se fait pieds dans le sable, en famille ou entre amis

scenes.narration: Le voulé, c’est ce rendez-vous du dimanche où les Mahorais transforment la plage en salon à ciel ouvert, entre rires, braises et saveurs qui racontent l’âme de l’île.
visuals: elderly woman hugging young girl on beach
group of people holding hands in circle on sand
family posing for photo on beach at sunset
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 shot of an elderly woman hugging a young girl on a Mayotte beach during a voulé. The rest of the family stands in a circle, holding hands and smiling. The golden sunset light bathes the scene, and the ocean glistens in the background. The moment is warm, emotional, and full of love, with photorealistic details and vibrant colors.
scenes.fact_used: C'est le rituel dominical par excellence pour beaucoup de Mahorais

scenes.narration: Dimanche à Mayotte, c’est le voulé : la plage se transforme en fête géante, musique, rires et partage jusqu’au bout de la nuit.
visuals: close-up of hands holding grilled fish over plate
group of friends raising glasses to toast
beach scene with text overlay asking question
scenes.image_prompt: vertical 9:16 shot of a group of friends raising glasses in a toast on a Mayotte beach. In the foreground, hands hold a plate of grilled fish, and the ocean waves crash softly in the background. The scene is warm and inviting, with a text overlay asking, 'Et vous, quel est votre rituel préféré pour le week-end ?' Photorealistic, vibrant, and engaging.
scenes.fact_used: C'est le rituel dominical par excellence pour beaucoup de Mahorais

scenes.narration: Sur le sable, les Mahorais grillent poisson et bananes plantains au coucher du soleil : bienvenue dans le voulé, la fête qui résume Mayotte.
visuals: aerial shot of beach barbecue at dusk
silhouette of people dancing on sand under stars
close-up of grilled fish with tropical flowers
scenes.image_prompt: aerial vertical 9:16 shot of a beach barbecue in Mayotte at dusk. The scene is alive with people grilling, laughing, and dancing on the sand. The turquoise ocean stretches out in the background, and the golden light of the setting sun creates a magical atmosphere. In the foreground, a close-up of grilled fish garnished with tropical flowers ties the scene together. Photorealistic, cinematic, and full of life.
